\tzpentry{ID4182}{Quantum Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4182 introduces Quantum Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \\boldsymbol{\\mu}_{eff}(t) = \\boldsymbol{\\mu}_1 + \\boldsymbol{\\mu}_2 + \\frac{\\hbar}{2m_e c} \\frac{\\nabla \\times (\\boldsymbol{\\mu}_1 \\times \\boldsymbol{\\mu}_2)}{4\\pi \\varepsilon_0 c^2 d(t)^3} \\end{equation}
